settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Delivery

Orders are shipped Monday to Friday, excluding bank holidays. Orders placed after 1pm are processed on the next working day.

UK Delivery:

  • Standard Delivery (1–4 working days): Free on orders over £25, or £2.69 for      orders under £25.
  • Next Day Delivery: £4.69 (order by 1pm for same-day dispatch).

International Delivery:

  • Netherlands (4–9 working days): €8.00
  • Ireland (4–7 working days): €7.00
  • Italy (7–10 working days): €10.00
  • Spain (7–10 working days): €8.69
  • Belgium (7–11 working days): €8.00
  • Poland (7–11 working days): zł 74.00

For full delivery details, please visit our Shipping Information page.

Returns & Exchanges

Easy & Hassle-Free Returns

We want you to love your purchase, but if you need to return an item, the process is quick and simple. You have 30 days from receiving your item to request a refund or exchange.

Returns

  • Our policy lasts 30 days. If 30 days have gone by since your purchase, unfortunately, we can’t offer you a refund or exchange.
  • To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging.
  • The products that are in new condition as that is dispatched will be considered for returns.
  • To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase and the returns have to be sent through traceable mail service.

There are certain situations where only partial refunds are granted (if applicable)

- Any item not in its original condition is damaged or missing parts for reasons not due to our error

- Any item that is returned more than 30 days after delivery

Exchanges & Faulty Items:
• Need a different item? Let us know within 14 days, For exchanges, you may be responsible for the cost of shipping the replacement item.
• Faulty or damaged item? Just send us a photo and we’ll sort it quickly.
• Missing, incorrect or damaged items must be reported within 48 hours of delivery.
• If a replacement isn’t available, we may offer a refund.

Returns Address:
LEDSone Ltd, Unit 3, Marshbrook Close, Coventry, CV2 2NW, United Kingdom.

For full details, visit our Refund Policy page.
